original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue from lineitem where l_shipdate >= date '1995-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1995-01-01' + interval '1' year and l_discount between 0.03 - 0.01 and 0.03 + 0.01 and l_quantity < 24;
rewritten_query:
select sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue 
from lineitem 
where l_shipdate >= date '1995-01-01' 
  and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01'
  and l_discount between 0.02 and 0.04
  and l_quantity < 24;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Simplify the date range calculation by using direct date comparison instead of adding an interval
Simplify the discount range calculation by using direct numeric values instead of arithmetic expressions
